about.metaDescription: Learn about Petstrology and the K-Saju Pet platform for personalized pet care.
about.aboutUsBody: Petstrology is a pet lifestyle tech company based in South Korea. We combine traditional Korean fortune-reading (Saju) with modern web technology to deliver personalized content based on your pet's date of birth.
about.productIntro: K-Saju Pet (ksajupet.com) is a personalized pet care platform powered by K-Saju birth chart reading.
about.bulletDailyFortune: Daily care guide (Free): Enter your pet's birth date for daily health, activity, appetite, and rest care tips that change every day.
about.bulletPersonality: Personalized care (Paid): Zodiac and pet–butler bond care guides, plus detailed MBTI diagnosis.
about.bulletPremium: Premium Saju Reports (Paid): We offer 11 in-depth Saju report products for pet owners, covering lifetime luck cycles, love, career, wealth, and more. Reports are available individually or as bundles.
about.bulletCommunity: Community: Weekly Pet Show rankings and challenge boards where pet parents connect.
about.paymentsNote: Payments are securely processed via TossPayments and PayPal.
about.contactLine1: Business name: Petstrology | CEO: Keyongmi Lee
about.contactLine3: Address: 806-32, 8F, 1688 Dongseo-daero, Dong-gu, Daejeon, South Korea

saju.hubSubtitle: Personalized pet care through K-Saju. Know their nature—and what to do for them today.
saju.zodiacSubtitle: Find your pet's zodiac traits by birth date and get today's care actions—refreshed daily in KST.
saju.compatibilitySubtitle: See how you and your pet differ in temperament—and how to care for each other better.
saju.premiumHubSubtitle: Pet–butler bond and zodiac care—personalized guides for your pet in one unlock.
saju.premiumSubtitle: When you're happy, your pet is too. A premium life-strategy report crafted only for butlers.
saju.premiumSidebarSampleHint: A peek at the cover, key scores, and luck roadmap.
saju.premiumSidebarInfo: Eleven in-depth butler reports based on your own birth chart and manse calendar. Get lifetime luck cycles, love, career, and wealth themes as PDF — with a free daily fortune preview first.
